en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy a cup.
A: Hello, what are you looking for?
B: I want to buy a hat.
A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?
B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?
A: Do you sell betel nut?
B: No, we don’t sell betel nut.

ab: veneli aken ta djuadjuay a paday.
en: A: I want to buy rice.
B: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: pavai aken tu tjelu ta djuadjuay a paday.
en: A: Give me three packs.

ab: vuvu na saveneli aken ta cinapa a vurasi.
en: A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: gemalju anga sun, neka anga vurasi.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: uri veneli aken tu drusa ta abudra.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.
B: We only have one bottle left.
A: Go buy me eggs.
B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: velian aken ta qecilu tu drusa iday.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: veneli aken tu drusa ta talekelekan a ada.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: veliu ca tjelu a talekelekan a ada lja!
ch: B:這裡剩下的三把蔥都賣你啦!
en: B: There are three left, all for you!
A: How much is this bag of rice?
B: $200 for a pack.

ab: tjelu a iday tu drusa puluq saka ita a penuljat, kana su pavain aken tu tjelu a iday tu drusa a puluq.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.
B: Thank you.

ab: siva a puluq saka lima a valjitjuq imaza.
en: A: Here’s $95.

ab: veneli anan aken, ku pazuljuan tu masan taiday.
en: B: I’ll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: lima a iday saka tapuluq a su vinelian a penuljat.
en: A:All $510.

ab: maqati a su kisangen a pacengeceng tu masan lima a iday?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?
No way!

ab: manu pazangal lja nu paveli sun ta nemanga, maqati a su papedjuluin?
ch: A:這個你也賣太貴了吧!可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It’s too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: saka numatazua, veneli aken tu kedri ta alju.
ch: A:不然，我只要買一點點糖果。
en: A: I want this packet of cookies.
B:anything else you need?
